text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm absolutely terrified of all the
expectations people have put on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day, I've been looking for a way
for Fuji Kiseki to overcome her crippling fear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ruminate over my conundrum as I walk to my
office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I get there, I see Fuji Kiseki inside,
watching a DVD intently.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, welcome back, Trainer! I hope you don't
mind me being here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: A DVD of one of my mother's plays.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've never seen my mother scared on
stage. Not even once.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many thousands of people are
watching her, she can still act better on stage
than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how she's able to stay calm and
collected under the weight of so many expectant
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Does it come naturally to her? Is it an act? Or is it
something she had to overcome?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what it is, but I feel like there must
be some hint in this DVD that can help me move
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'm not the only one desperate to find an
answer to her problem. And if that's the case...
choice_data_list: May I watch it with you?
May I watch it with you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course! That's the whole reason I brought it
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The play is set in early modern France and starts
with a queen locked in a prison.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"If I could have a single wish granted, then I wish
to return to the beautiful land of Austria!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jaunty music starts to play just as her mournful
wail trails off, and the stage is flooded with bright
light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, the soot-covered queen is
transformed into a sweet girl. She runs through a
castle filled with lush flora.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My mother is the only actor in this play. She
performs the queen in her tragic life as well as all
the supporting characters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through the screen comes the judgmental glance
of a servant, the retreating form of a peasant girl,
the lively banter of a street performer, and the
solemn soliloquy of a king.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's mother dons and sheds the
personality of each character with stunning
speed, but there's never confusion as to who she
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each of her poignant lines draws the audience
into her world, and as if in response, sighs and
short cries can be heard spilling from the seats.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon, I forget that I'm watching an actor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And we arrive at the climax of the story.

text_block_list.name: Fuji's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"Now burn the image of my form upon those
beautiful eyes of yours, dark and deep as the
night!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets a lone bluebird free into the azure sky,
and the ring of applause echoes through the
venue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtains of the solo performance close on a
never-ending standing ovation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Incredible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meant to find a clue to our problem in the show,
but I ended up completely absorbed in the play.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She is. I've never seen another actor as good as
her, and I'm not just saying that because I'm her
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So many people want to become as skilled as her,
but practically no one's succeeded. I didn't
manage to either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I have a better idea of the pinnacle Fuji
Kiseki is aiming for as she attempts to be the
greatest entertainer ever.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whenever she's onstage, she loses herself
completely and becomes the very embodiment of
the characters she plays.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I still have no idea what she was thinking while
she was up there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely, there's a faster way to solve this puzzle. I
don't sense that her relationship with her mother
is strained, so I give her a suggestion.
choice_data_list: Why not try asking her directly?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Mm... I guess I could.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I've been avoiding her because I'm
scared she won't understand my feelings...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But you're right. I don't have the luxury of
keeping my distance after watching that
performance of hers.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Can you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, it's decided that we'll meet with Fuji
Kiseki's mother this coming weekend.
